approved_command_preview:
$repo = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_REPO_ROOT','Machine')
$downloads = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR','Machine')
$script = Join-Path $repo 'operator_tools\github_desktop_lane\scripts\New-DcoirAirtableDatabaseHealthExport.ps1'
& $script -ExportMode BoundedRecords -MaxRecordsPerTable 25 -MetadataScope 'All' -ProbeUnsupportedMetadata -NoZip
$export = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $downloads -Directory -Filter 'dcoir_airtable_health_export_*' | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1
$schemas = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath (Join-Path $export.FullName 'schema') -Filter 'table.*.schema.json'
$records = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath (Join-Path $export.FullName 'records') -Filter 'table.*.records.json'
$rows = foreach ($schemaFile in $schemas) { $s = Get-Content -LiteralPath $schemaFile.FullName -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $recFile = $records | Where-Object { $_.BaseName -eq $schemaFile.BaseName.Replace('.schema','.records') } | Select-Object -First 1; $recordCount = $null; if ($recFile) { $r = Get-Content -LiteralPath $recFile.FullName -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($r.records) { $recordCount = @($r.records).Count } }; [pscustomobject]@{ table_id=$s.id; table_name=$s.name; primary_field_id=$s.primaryFieldId; field_count=@($s.fields).Count; view_count=@($s.views).Count; bounded_record_count=$recordCount; linked_record_field_count=@($s.fields | Where-Object { $_.type -eq 'multipleRecordLinks' }).Count; select_field_count=@($s.fields | Where-Object { $_.type -in @('singleSelect','multipleSelects') }).Count; id_key_field_count=@($s.fields | Where-Object { $_.name -match '(?i)(^id$|_id$| id$|key|canonical|source|locator)' }).Count; lifecycle_field_count=@($s.fields | Where-Object { $_.name -match '(?i)(created_at|updated_at|review_after|status|retention|stage|state)' }).Count } }
$outDir = Join-Path $downloads 'cleanup_wbs01_inventory_report_20260505'
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $outDir | Out-Null
$rows | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 | Set-Content -LiteralPath (Join-Path $outDir 'table_inventory_index.json') -Encoding UTF8
$md = @('# CLEANUP-WBS-01 table inventory index','','Generated by chatgpt-exec from read-only Airtable export. No Airtable records were modified.','','| table | fields | views | sample records | linked fields | select fields | id/key fields | lifecycle fields |','|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|') + ($rows | Sort-Object table_name | ForEach-Object { '| ' + $_.table_name + ' | ' + $_.field_count + ' | ' + $_.view_count + ' | ' + $_.bounded_record_count + ' | ' + $_.linked_record_field_count + ' | ' + $_.select_field_count + ' | ' + $_.id_key_field_count + ' | ' + $_.lifecycle_field_count + ' |' })
$md | Set-Content -LiteralPath (Join-Path $outDir 'table_inventory_index.md') -Encoding UTF8
Write-Output ('Generated CLEANUP-WBS-01 inventory report at ' + $outDir)
command:
$repo = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_REPO_ROOT','Machine')
$downloads = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR','Machine')
$script = Join-Path $repo 'operator_tools\github_desktop_lane\scripts\New-DcoirAirtableDatabaseHealthExport.ps1'
& $script -ExportMode BoundedRecords -MaxRecordsPerTable 25 -MetadataScope 'All' -ProbeUnsupportedMetadata -NoZip
$export = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $downloads -Directory -Filter 'dcoir_airtable_health_export_*' | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1
$schemas = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath (Join-Path $export.FullName 'schema') -Filter 'table.*.schema.json'
$records = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath (Join-Path $export.FullName 'records') -Filter 'table.*.records.json'
$rows = foreach ($schemaFile in $schemas) { $s = Get-Content -LiteralPath $schemaFile.FullName -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $recFile = $records | Where-Object { $_.BaseName -eq $schemaFile.BaseName.Replace('.schema','.records') } | Select-Object -First 1; $recordCount = $null; if ($recFile) { $r = Get-Content -LiteralPath $recFile.FullName -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($r.records) { $recordCount = @($r.records).Count } }; [pscustomobject]@{ table_id=$s.id; table_name=$s.name; primary_field_id=$s.primaryFieldId; field_count=@($s.fields).Count; view_count=@($s.views).Count; bounded_record_count=$recordCount; linked_record_field_count=@($s.fields | Where-Object { $_.type -eq 'multipleRecordLinks' }).Count; select_field_count=@($s.fields | Where-Object { $_.type -in @('singleSelect','multipleSelects') }).Count; id_key_field_count=@($s.fields | Where-Object { $_.name -match '(?i)(^id$|_id$| id$|key|canonical|source|locator)' }).Count; lifecycle_field_count=@($s.fields | Where-Object { $_.name -match '(?i)(created_at|updated_at|review_after|status|retention|stage|state)' }).Count } }
$outDir = Join-Path $downloads 'cleanup_wbs01_inventory_report_20260505'
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $outDir | Out-Null
$rows | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 | Set-Content -LiteralPath (Join-Path $outDir 'table_inventory_index.json') -Encoding UTF8
$md = @('# CLEANUP-WBS-01 table inventory index','','Generated by chatgpt-exec from read-only Airtable export. No Airtable records were modified.','','| table | fields | views | sample records | linked fields | select fields | id/key fields | lifecycle fields |','|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|') + ($rows | Sort-Object table_name | ForEach-Object { '| ' + $_.table_name + ' | ' + $_.field_count + ' | ' + $_.view_count + ' | ' + $_.bounded_record_count + ' | ' + $_.linked_record_field_count + ' | ' + $_.select_field_count + ' | ' + $_.id_key_field_count + ' | ' + $_.lifecycle_field_count + ' |' })
$md | Set-Content -LiteralPath (Join-Path $outDir 'table_inventory_index.md') -Encoding UTF8
Write-Output ('Generated CLEANUP-WBS-01 inventory report at ' + $outDir)
